title: The Remaining Fights Continue
description: Pages 11–15 focus on the remaining fights continue, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Baby 5, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as even as executives fall, the Birdcage keeps shrinking and turns the whole country into a race against time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That son of A-! Those people are injured!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You're a real tough guy, dickwad! Going after the wounded and weakened!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Just who do you think is...

dialogue.speaker: Pica
dialogue.text: Currently on the old, Royal Plateau?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: He's surrounded by all the IM- Portland people of his old kingdom...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The Samurai and God usopp are with him as well...

dialogue.speaker: Pica
dialogue.text: What's more, it seems the people of this country are all hoping for King Riku to reclaim the throne.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: And you're telling me this why!?

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Don't they just piss you off? I mean, the King of this country is doffy.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: This country belongs to the Don- Quiljote!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Wait a goddamn second... Don't tell me he's after the King!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Is that why he ran me all the way out here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: So I can't catch up with him!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Shit... I fell for it hook, line, and sinker!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: This is bad...just one of that bastard's punches...

dialogue.speaker: Pica
dialogue.text: is enough to blow the plateau to smitherreens!

summary: The Remaining Fights Continue advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Baby 5, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
